case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. GLAD TO BE HOME DISTRIBUTORS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION ON DEFENDANT GLAD TO BE HOME DISTRIBUTORS INC. LOPINTO, JOSEPH

LOPINTO, JOSEPH $15,458.86 PRINCIPAL, $1,875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $288.32 INTEREST, $181.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,803.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION OF ROGER GUERTIN RE: COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
